mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO news_data (special_report_id, alert_id, title, content, video, platform, source, publisher, publish_time, comment, region, original_url, article_type, source_url) VALUES
(#{item.specialReportId}, #{item.alertId}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.video}, #{item.platform}, #{item.source}, #{item.publisher}, #{item.publishTime}, #{item.comment}, #{item.region}, #{item.originalUrl}, #{item.articleType}, #{item.sourceUrl})
